name: Notification Hell
description: Check your notification feed or lose!

always-on.name: Always On
always-on.description:
Keep the spammy notifications always on outside of regular gameplay.

> ![**<!>**](frame:geode.loader/info-warning.png?scale=0.375) <cy>*If you have [Horrible Menu](mod:cubicstudios.horriblemenu) enabled, this setting will require you to enable the 'Spam Notifications' option.*</c>

<mod:cubicstudios.horriblemenu>

challenge-mode.name: Challenge Mode
challenge-mode.description: Add a notification feed that puts a time limit on how long you have left to actually respond to notifications.
challenge-mode.enable-if-description: Persistent notifications must be disabled to use Challenge Mode.
